description: You are logged into wger as the administrator. A new personal trainer named Maria Santos has been hired at the gym and needs her own user account to manage client workouts. Create a new user account with the username 'maria_santos', password 'TrainerPass2024!', first name 'Maria', last name 'Santos', and email 'maria.santos@fitnessgym.com'. Ensure the account is active and the user can log in with the specified credentials. The administrator login credentials are: username 'admin', password 'adminadmin'.
